Table of Contents

AssignDataModel

Description: Assigns and prepares the data model for Razor event templates. It calls the base class's AssignDataModel, sets up date parameters for calendar views, and populates several event lists (next events, past events, monthly events, etc.) into the SimplisityRazor model. Signature

public new string AssignDataModel(SimplisityRazor sModel)

Example

@{ AssignDataModel(Model); }

RssEventUrl

Description: Generates a URL for an RSS feed of events for a specific month and year. The URL includes parameters for the command, month, year, and a SQL index for sorting by event start date. Signature

public IEncodedString RssEventUrl(int portalId, string cmd, int monthDate, int yearDate)

Example

@RssEventUrl(0, "eventsfeed", 12, 2023)

monthStartDate

Description: The start date of the current month being viewed. Signature

public DateTime monthStartDate;

monthEndDate

Description: The end date of the current month being viewed. Signature

public DateTime monthEndDate;

calMonthStartDate

Description: The start date of the calendar month being displayed. Signature

public DateTime calMonthStartDate;

articleEventStartDate

Description: The start date of the event for the current article. Signature

public DateTime articleEventStartDate;

articleEventEndDate

Description: The end date of the event for the current article. Signature

public DateTime articleEventEndDate;

listUrlParams

Description: An array of URL parameters for the event list. Signature

public string[] listUrlParams;

DNNrocket Project
